purpose: Qualify UIdetox against a remediated full-stack fixture with retained baseline evidence.

intent.product_goal: Provide a runnable B2B operations fixture that demonstrates UIdetox baseline-to-remediation work while preserving verified frontend, API, and database behavior.
intent.audience: UIdetox maintainers, beta testers, and agent-harness evaluators
intent.primary_job: Verify that UIdetox can map intent, correct structural and visual defects, preserve routes, and keep frontend operations aligned with API and database contracts.

operation_evidence: Literal frontend/src/api/client.ts wrapper calls resolved by UIdetox source facts
baseline_slop_families: emoji icon tiles and fabricated metrics
optimistic mutations that drift from persisted state
frontend, backend, and database operation mismatches
fixed-height records with clipped text and weak responsive behavior
remediation_targets: all visible actions verified against persisted API state
canonical intent and baseline evidence retained
